title: Hey Ya!
album: Hip To The Hop: 30th Anniversary Of Hip Hop Hip To Da Hop
why_this_song: Hey Ya! by Outkast (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Shake it, sh-shake it, shake it, sh-shake it (uh-oh)"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Hey, alright now, alright now, fellas (yeah?)"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "My baby don't mess around"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And this I know for sure (uh)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Then what makes, then what makes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alright" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Shake it, sh-shake it, shake it, sh-shake it

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Outkast one question about "Hey Ya!", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Outkast sobre "Hey Ya!", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hey Ya!" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hey Ya!" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hey Ya!" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hey Ya!" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
